rubric_items.text: The primary teaching object is visually prominent.
Labels are legible and read clearly against their background.
Labels point near their intended objects and read attached, not detached.
Objects have comfortable spacing without looking artificially scattered.
The bench layout looks physically plausible.
Labels and objects preserve scientific meaning; every scientific asset is fully shown, with no cropping, misleading overlap, or hidden important object.

calibration_note: Compare each scene's AI scores against the human calibration label in docs/active_plans/decisions/ai_polish_review_calibration.md. Promotion to a gate is deferred until calibration shows stable, useful results.
